positioning: doctor-formulated Ayurvedic weight-loss system for overweight and obese adults
fast visible weight loss without relying on injections, crash diets, hard-to-sustain gym routines, or extreme lifestyle changes
structured, guided system that makes weight loss easier to follow in real life
all-natural Ayurvedic system with no side effects
holistic system, not a standalone supplement, not merely an appetite suppressant or fat-burner
works with regular homemade food, no separate meal prep required
reduces guesswork with clear daily routine and defined food guidance
guided system with trained coach support and daily tracker
promise_claims: easier caloric deficit without feeling weak or depleted
better digestion and improved gut comfort
no separate meal prep required, can eat regular homemade food
structured routine with less guesswork and reduced decision fatigue
access to trained coach guidance and daily progress tracking
weight loss that does not bounce back on its own
no dependency created by the product
usable in harder weight-loss situations such as PCOD, PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, diabetes, fatty liver, IBS, menopause-related weight gain
eligibility: overweight and obese adults with a BMI above 25
usable in conditions such as PCOD, PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, diabetes, fatty liver, IBS, menopause-related weight gain, provided the user does not fall into defined exclusion categories
adults who want natural or Ayurvedic weight-loss option
adults who struggle with stubborn fat, belly fat, cravings, emotional eating, low energy, slow progress, or repeated failure with diets
exclusions: people on multiple psychiatric medications - treated as doctor-review situations
people who have undergone multiple surgeries - treated as doctor-review situations
caution_conditions: first 3 days are an adjustment period
people on multiple psychiatric medications require doctor review before use
people who have undergone multiple surgeries require doctor review before use
weight-loss effect should not be positioned like first few courses for users below BMI of 25
protocol_morning: OK Liquid taken every morning on an empty stomach
warm the pouch in hot water before consumption
no solid food for the next 4 hours after OK Liquid
zero-calorie drinks such as tea, coffee, lemon water, lemon tea, and jeera water are allowed during the 4-hour window
dried amla taken after the liquid as natural mouth freshener and digestion support
protocol_night: OK Tablet taken at night, 15 minutes before bed
OK Powder taken at night, 15 minutes before bed, followed by warm water
OK Tablet positioned as digestive support for bloating, acidity, and gas
OK Powder supports digestion, nutrient absorption, and waste excretion
fasting_rules: no solid food for 4 hours after morning OK Liquid
zero-calorie drinks only during the 4-hour post-liquid window
allowed_items: zero-calorie drinks: tea, coffee, lemon water, lemon tea, jeera water
regular homemade food within allowed food guidance
foods from the allowed list provided in the information booklet
restricted_items: no solid food for 4 hours after morning liquid
foods listed as not allowed in the information booklet
mechanism_allowed_claims: OK Liquid reduces hunger and cravings, improves satiety, helps maintain caloric deficit without feeling weak
OK Tablet and OK Powder support digestion, gut comfort, and metabolic function
reduces bloating, acidity, gas, constipation, and heaviness
supports digestive fire and metabolic activation through ingredients such as Chitrak, Ginger, Black Pepper, Long Pepper, Cumin, Kala Jeera, Nagar Motha, Chavya, Pippali Mula
supports fat mobilization and tissue scraping through ingredients such as Guggulu, Chitrak, Black Pepper, Haritaki, Sajji Kshar, Long Pepper
supports detoxification, gut cleanup, and elimination through ingredients such as Haritaki, Baheda, Vidanga, Sanay, Amla, Murcchita Sneha
supports water balance, swelling reduction, and channel clearance through ingredients such as Gokshura, Gambhari, Patala, Arani, Brihati, Kantakari
supports balancing and strengthening through ingredients such as Amla, Shalaparni, Prishnaparni
supports pachakagni and dhatvagni, reduces accumulation of aam, promotes detoxification
multi-action system that supports both lower intake and better internal functioning
mechanism_disallowed_claims: do not position merely as an appetite-control product or fat-burner - it is a holistic multi-action system
do not say the product will cure all obesity-related conditions - it is a weight-loss product despite those conditions, not a cure-all
do not ever say that gym and dieting are not the right way to lose weight
do not ever demean any other brand
do not portray obesity as a lack of will power or intent - acknowledge it as a disease
do not rely on older ingredient counts such as 39 herbs
safety_public_line: natural Ayurvedic course with no side effects
safety_internal_handling: first 3 days are an adjustment period
distinguish between public 'no side effects' claim and internal 'first 3 days adjustment period' handling guidance
support teams should use the adjustment period framing to answer early-course questions consistently
guarantee: if the user does not start losing weight within 7 days, they can request a full refund
conditions: follow course as instructed in the course booklet and share the daily tracker so the team can guide them
if both conditions are met and the customer still sees no progress, the guarantee is honored
continuation: kit can be continued until user reaches target weight or reaches a BMI of 25
after every 30 days, users should take a break of 7 to 10 days
purpose of break is to help learn weight maintenance and allow body to accept reduced weight as new normal
technically can be taken below BMI of 25, but weight-loss effect should not be positioned like first few courses
below BMI of 25, other benefits such as detoxification may still exist
maintenance: weight loss is sustainable and does not bounce back on its own
not based on superficial methods such as dehydration or temporary water loss
body stays hydrated and nourished during the course
eat according to BMR: 1200 to 1400 calories for females, 1400 to 1600 calories for males
macro prioritization order: protein first, then fiber, then fats, then carbs
follow maintenance instructions in the information booklet
Arogyam Maintenance Kit available for extra support
proof_points: real customer results: before and after transformations, customer testimonials, video testimonials, specific weight-loss outcomes shared by users
founder credibility: formulated by Dr. Arun Tyagi, Ayurvedic doctor with 34 years of practice, linked to Arogyam Ayurvedic Panchakarma Hospital and Research Centre
daily tracker with trained coach guidance and real follow-up during the journey
coherent product logic: multi-action system with OK Liquid for intake side and OK Tablet/Powder for processing side
messaging_guardrails: Benefit Hierarchy (BEN-1 to BEN-9): BEN-1 fast visible weight loss leads; BEN-3 used when user worries about safety; BEN-4 for meal prep concerns; BEN-5 for confusion/overwhelm; BEN-6 for reassurance on support; BEN-8 and BEN-9 as supporting benefits only

Differentiator Hierarchy (DIFF-1 to DIFF-10): DIFF-1 fast visible results without side effects and DIFF-2 all-natural Ayurvedic lead; DIFF-4 to DIFF-7 explain ease of following; DIFF-8 for users with existing conditions; DIFF-9 and DIFF-10 for sustainability and dependency

Proof Hierarchy (PRF-1 to PRF-7): PRF-1 real customer results leads; PRF-2 for trust questions; PRF-3 and PRF-4 as supporting social proof; PRF-5 for purchase-risk objections; PRF-6 for adherence concerns
Maintenance Story (MAIN-1 to MAIN-10): MAIN-1 to MAIN-3 for bounce-back concerns; MAIN-4 to MAIN-7 for how to maintain; MAIN-8 and MAIN-9 for continuation; MAIN-10 for extra post-course support
Creator Story (CREATOR-1 to CREATOR-8): CREATOR-1 to CREATOR-3 for who made it; CREATOR-4 to CREATOR-7 for credibility; CREATOR-8 connecting founder story to product design
do not let secondary benefits overshadow the main product promise of fast visible weight loss
do not make 'no separate meal prep' the center of brand positioning
Obesity is a serious health condition, not just cosmetic - deserves root-cause treatment
priority_block: BEN-1 (fast visible weight loss) is the highest priority benefit - lead with it in most product explanations
DIFF-1 (fast visible results without side effects) and DIFF-2 (all-natural Ayurvedic formulation) lead differentiation explanations
PRF-1 (real customer results) leads most persuasive consumer-facing contexts
CREATOR-1 (created by Dr. Arun Tyagi) to CREATOR-3 (decades of obesity-focused care) lead credibility explanations
MAIN-1 (weight does not bounce back on its own) leads maintenance messaging
protected_themes: easy to follow in real life
guided system with trained coach support
usable in harder weight-loss situations (PCOD, PCOS, thyroid, high BP, etc.)
trigger_rules: use BEN-3 (no side effects) when user is worried about safety or side effects
use BEN-4 (homemade-food compatibility) when user is worried about meal prep, family food, or time burden
use BEN-5 (reduced guesswork) when user feels confused or overwhelmed by weight-loss plans
use BEN-6 (trained coach support) when user needs reassurance that support is available
use BEN-8 and BEN-9 as supporting benefits, not as the main promise
Lead with DIFF-1 and DIFF-2 in most product explanations
Use DIFF-4 to DIFF-7 to explain why product feels easier to follow in real life
Use DIFF-8 when addressing users with existing conditions
Use DIFF-9 and DIFF-10 when addressing long-term sustainability and dependency concerns
Lead with PRF-1 in most persuasive consumer-facing contexts
Use PRF-2 when user is asking why they should trust the product
Use PRF-3 and PRF-4 as supporting social proof, not as the first line every time
Use PRF-5 when handling hesitation or purchase-risk objections
Use PRF-6 when concern is adherence, confusion, or feeling unsupported
Use PRF-7 when explaining why product feels logically designed, but do not let it replace real-world proof
Use MAIN-1 to MAIN-3 when answering bounce-back concerns
Use MAIN-4 to MAIN-7 when explaining how users should maintain results
Use MAIN-8 and MAIN-9 when explaining continuation
Use MAIN-10 when user wants extra post-course support
Use CREATOR-1 to CREATOR-3 when answering who made the product
Use CREATOR-4 to CREATOR-7 when explaining why product has stronger credibility than a generic supplement
Use CREATOR-8 when connecting founder story to product design
